overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an industrial outskirts area of Night City. The scene features overgrown dirt paths, graffiti-covered concrete walls, highway overpasses, and industrial buildings under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown industrial outskirts with scattered buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dry grass field toward a concrete wall with distant industrial towers visible

entered.detail: tall cylindrical industrial tower with large white 07 signage near the top
small blue corrugated metal building with colorful circular sign on the side
elevated concrete highway structure spanning across the horizon
long concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and murals
tall palm tree with dry fronds near the concrete wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in an overgrown industrial area with dry grass and dirt paths. A tall industrial tower marked '07' dominates the right skyline while a small blue utility building sits nearby. The camera approaches a long graffiti-covered concrete wall with a palm tree visible on the left, heading toward a distant highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered perimeter wall with large murals

agents.ego_description: walking parallel to the graffiti wall, passing sections with elaborate murals

entered.detail: large red and teal graffiti mural depicting a stylized face with cybernetic elements
scattered trash bags and discarded materials accumulated along the wall base

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the extensive concrete perimeter wall, revealing a striking large-scale face mural in red and teal colors. Debris and trash bags line the base of the wall. The highway overpass looms closer ahead as the industrial buildings from the opening fade from view behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass with concrete support pillars

events.description: enters shadow under highway overpass, lighting shifts from bright sun to dappled shade

agents.ego_description: walking under the highway overpass through accumulated trash and debris

entered.detail: underside of concrete highway deck with visible support beams and shadow patterns
massive angled concrete pillars supporting the highway above
numerous blue and black garbage bags piled against the wall and pillars
large mustard-yellow industrial warehouse building visible through the underpass

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the shadowy space beneath the highway overpass, supported by massive angled concrete pillars. The lighting shifts dramatically to dappled shade. Trash bags and debris are scattered throughout the underpass. A yellow industrial building becomes visible in the distance ahead as the graffiti wall continues along the right side.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial yard with yellow warehouse and flag mural

events.description: exits underpass back into bright direct sunlight
transitions from covered underpass to open industrial yard

agents.ego_description: emerging from underpass into open area, approaching yellow building with large mural

entered.detail: tall building with large illuminated 24/7 signage in blue and yellow
large black mural on yellow building depicting a figure holding an American flag
red and white striped concrete road barriers stacked near the building

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass into bright sunlight, the scene opens into an industrial yard dominated by a mustard-yellow warehouse featuring a massive black mural of a figure with an American flag. A 24/7 billboard is visible on a distant building to the left. Concrete barriers line the path as the camera moves past the yellow building toward a larger industrial complex ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial complex with elevated walkways and dome structure

agents.ego_description: approaching large industrial complex with dome and elevated structures

entered.detail: large circular dome structure with glass panels atop the industrial complex
raised metal walkway connecting industrial buildings with support columns
network of large industrial pipes and ventilation equipment on building roofs

segments.scene_description: The camera moves toward a sprawling industrial complex featuring a prominent glass dome and elevated metal walkways connecting multiple buildings. The yellow warehouse falls behind as the path leads deeper into the industrial zone, with various pipes and ventilation structures visible on the rooftops ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an overgrown industrial wasteland that transitions from open dirt paths into a dense complex of warehouses and metal structures. It begins by moving past a tall industrial tower and a blue utility building, approaching a long concrete wall adorned with graffiti and a single palm tree. As the camera tracks along the perimeter, a large red and teal face mural emerges from the debris before the scene shifts into the dappled shade beneath a massive highway overpass supported by angled concrete pillars. The camera then exits the shadows back into bright sunlight, opening into an industrial yard dominated by a mustard-yellow warehouse featuring a large black mural and a distant 24/7 billboard. Finally, the path leads away from the yellow building and deeper into a sprawling industrial zone characterized by a prominent glass dome, elevated metal walkways, and rooftop ventilation pipes.
